zh.lifeSummary: 當Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal於1187年5月28日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多時，她的父親Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla31歲，母親Eleanor of England Queen of Castile26歲。她於1205年與Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1187年住在西班牙且於1205年住在葡萄牙。她去世於1220年11月3日在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉享年33歲，埋葬在葡萄牙波爾塔利格阿爾可巴薩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal于1187年5月28日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多时，她的父亲Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla31岁，母亲Eleanor of England Queen of Castile26岁。她于1205年与Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1187年住在西班牙且于1205年住在葡萄牙。她去世于1220年11月3日在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉享年33岁，埋葬在葡萄牙波爾塔利格阿爾可巴薩。

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Carlos, Jorge, Pedro, Ramon, Luis, Rafael, Jesus, Gustavo.  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Elio, Heriberto, Leonardo, Lorenzo, Aldo, Angelo, Annamaria, Antonino, Carmelo, Carmine.
Spanish and southern Italian: from the personal name Alfonso, derived from the Visigothic name Adefonsus, formed from Gothic hathu ‘war’ + funs ‘ready’. Compare Alphonso .

variants.name: Alfonsi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Ferdinando, Antonio, Benigno, Cesare, Elisabetta, Giuseppe, Italo, Marco, Mario, Mirella, Silvio, Tiberio.
Italian (southern): patronymic or plural form of   Alfonso  .

variants.name: D'Alonzo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Augustino, Domenic, Emelio, Fiore, Rocco, Romeo.
Italian (D'Alonzo): patronymic from Alonso, avariant of the personal name Alfonso .

variants.name: De Fronzo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Rocco, Angelo, Biagio, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Fronzo, a shortform of Alfonso .

variants.name: Alphonso
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Andres, Belmiro, Eulalia, Gaspar, Manuel.  French Celestine, Marcel, Pierre.
Altered form of Spanish and southern Italian   Alfonso  .

variants.name: Alonso
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Jorge, Francisco, Pedro, Luis, Roberto, Angel, Enrique, Jesus, Antonio, Leonardo, Cecilio, Dario, Marco, Angelo, Clemente, Elio, Heriberto, Ciriaco, Delio.
Spanish: from the personal name Alonso, the Castilian variant of Alfonso .

variants.name: Di Fonzo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Alfonso, Biagio, Carmine, Domenic, Eliseo, Eraldo, Onofrio, Panfilo, Pio, Raffaele, Renato, Salvatore, Valentino.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Fonzo, a shortform of Alfonso . The change of s to z is typicalof southern and central Italy.

variants.name: Afonso
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Antonio, Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Domingos, Ana, Mario, Abilio, Alfredo, Americo, Arlindo, Francisco, Sergio.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Caetano, Lidio.
Portuguese: from the personal name Afonso, an equivalent of Spanish Alfonso .

variants.name: Alphonse
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Marcel, Raymonde, Antoine, Benoit, Clovis, Hermite, Jacques, Michel, Pierre, Ricot, Yves.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Seychellois: from the French personal name Alphonse, from Alphonsus, a Latinized spelling of Spanish Alfonso .

variants.name: Alfonzo
meanings: Spanish: variant of   Alfonso  .

variants.name: D'Alfonso
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Alfonso, Claudio, Ermanno, Sal, Angelo, Carmel, Delio, Domenic, Domenico, Fiore, Mauro, Nunzi, Nunzio, Pasquale.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name   Alfonso  ; thisform is typical of Abruzzo.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal was born on 28 May 1187, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, her father, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, was 31 and her mother, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, was 26. She married Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal in 1205, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Spain in 1187 and Portugal in 1205. She died on 3 November 1220, in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, at the age of 33, and was buried in Alcobaça, Portalegre, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal est née le 28 mai 1187, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal en 1205, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Espagne en 1187 et à Portugal en 1205. Elle est décédée le 3 novembre 1220, à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Alcobaça, Portalegre, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal am 28. Mai 1187 in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla 31 und ihre Mutter Eleanor of England Queen of Castile 26. Sie hat 1205 in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1187 hat sie in Spanien und 1205 in Portugal gelebt. Sie starb am 3. November 1220 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal und wurde in Alcobaça, Portalegre, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal è nata il il 28 maggio 1187 nel Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, sua padre, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal nel 1205, nel Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Spagna nel 1187 e nel Portogallo nel 1205. Morì il 3 novembre 1220, nel Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Alcobaça, Portalegre, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugalが1187年5月28日にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドで生まれた時，父Rey Alfonso VIII de Castillaは31歳，母Eleanor of England Queen of Castileは26歳であった。1205年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドでAfonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1187年にはスペインに，1205年にはポルトガルに住んでいた。彼女は1220年11月3日にポルトガルコインブラコインブラで33歳で死去し，ポルトガルポルタレグアアルコバcアにて埋葬された。

ko.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o a빌라 굿이레-무n즈
ko.lifeSummary: Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal(이)가 1187년 5월 28일 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor of England Queen of Castile(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1205년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1187년도에 스페인에서, 1205년도에 포르투갈에서 살았다. 그녀는 1220년 11월 3일 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 포탤그르 알컵아c아에 묻혔다.

pt.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal nasceu em 28 de maio de 1187, em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal em 1205, em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Espanha em 1187 e em Portugal em 1205. Ela faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1220, em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Alcobaça, Portalegre, Portugal.

ru.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: гутиирре-муnоз, aвила, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal родилась 28 мая 1187 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal в 1205 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности Испания в 1187 году и в местности Португалия в 1205 году. Она умерла 3 ноября 1220 г. в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности алкобаcа, портеилегр, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal nació el 28 de mayo de 1187, en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal en 1205, en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en España en 1187 y en Portugal en 1205. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1220, en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Alcobaça, Portalegre, Portugal.
